name: csnl-paper-rec-v2
description: Per-researcher personalized academic-paper recommendation automation for the CSNL lab. Harness-engineered multi-agent system driven by a PostgreSQL record of each member's latest research interests (csnl_research.projects), with a PostgreSQL recommendation ledger.

scripts.test: echo "no automated test suite — see docs/VERIFICATION-v2.md" && exit 0
